_about: Procrustes release-gate configuration. The manuscript is COMPLETE and reproduces green, but the DISTINCTNESS-FROM-GAUGE claim -- the load-bearing novelty -- forward-cites Gauge, which is unpublished. This gate is keyed on GAUGE: it reports HELD until Gauge is PUBLISHED (published=true AND a real DOI). LATTICE (the synthetic substrate) is a recommended secondary anchor. ARMING THE HOLD IS THE AUTHOR'S CALL (GATE G): the author may instead choose to SUBMIT NOW, forward-citing Gauge as in-review. Never set published=true without a real DOI.

GAUGE.role: distinctness anchor (the identifiability wall this work is shown distinct from)
GAUGE.status: in review / manuscript assembled; target Magnetic Resonance in Medicine

author_decision._note: Set by the author at GATE G. mode = 'hold' (wait for Gauge to publish, then submit) or 'submit_now' (submit forward-citing Gauge as in-review). Default 'hold' until the author decides.
